KICKOFF.text: The referee blows the whistle and we are underway! {team} kicks off.
**Kickoff!** The crowd roars as the match begins with {team} in possession.
The whistle sounds and both sides charge into the opening exchanges. {team} starts.

CHANCE.text: {actor} picks up the ball in a dangerous area for {team}!
{actor} drives forward for {team}, probing the final third...
A slick passing move releases {actor} into space for {team}!
{team} works the ball through midfield and {actor} sees an opening!
{actor} picks out a run on the overlap — {team} threatening here!
{team} is piling on the pressure, and {actor} finds space at the edge of the box!
Wave after wave of attacks from {team}! {actor} has the ball in a lethal position!
A late surge by {team}! {actor} breaks through the defensive line!
The clock is ticking! {actor} blazes forward for {team} in what could be the last chance!
Deadlocked match and {actor} has a chance to break it open for {team}!
Against the run of play, {actor} finds a pocket of space for {team}!

GOAL.text: **GOAL!** {actor} curls it beautifully into the top corner for {team}!
**GOAL!** A thunderous strike from {actor}! The net ripples for {team}!
**GOAL!** Clinical finish from {actor}, who makes no mistake for {team}!
**GOAL!** {actor} slots it home with composure! {team} celebrates!
**GOAL!** A pinpoint header from {actor}! {team} take the lead!
**UNBELIEVABLE!** {actor} scores a crucial late goal for {team}!
**DRAMA!** {actor} fires home in the dying minutes! {team} go wild!
{team}'s dominance pays off! {actor}'s clinical finish puts them ahead!
**Inevitable!** {team} have been knocking on the door and {actor} smashes it open!
**THE DEADLOCK IS BROKEN!** {actor} finds the breakthrough for {team}!
**Against ALL odds!** {actor} scores a stunner against the run of play for {team}!

SAVE.text: **What a save!** {actor} pulls off a spectacular stop to keep it out!
Brilliant reflexes from {actor}! A fingertip save denies the attacker!
{actor} reads the shot perfectly and smothers it at the near post!
**DENIED!** {actor} springs to the right and claws it away! Corner!
A point-blank save from {actor}! How has that stayed out?!
Keeping the scores level! {actor} makes a world-class save!
**CRUCIAL SAVE!** {actor} preserves the lead with a heroic late stop!
{actor} stands firm under relentless pressure! Another big save!
{actor} comes up huge despite being under siege all match! Magnificent!

MISS.text: {actor} takes a shot but it flies wide of the post.
{actor} lets fly from distance but it sails over the crossbar.
A scuffed effort from {actor} — that should have been better!
{actor} pulls the trigger but drags the shot wide. Goal kick.
**A massive chance wasted!** {actor} blazes over with the goal at their mercy!
**So close!** {actor}'s late shot strikes the crossbar and bounces away!
**Agonising!** {actor} fires wide when it looked easier to score!
**Still pushing!** {actor}'s shot goes just wide — {team} won't stop!

FOUL.text: **Foul!** {actor} slides in aggressively and gets a firm talking to by the ref.
{actor} brings down the attacker — free kick in a dangerous area.
A cynical challenge from {actor} halts a promising attack.
**Tension is rising!** {actor} commits a tactical foul to break the play.
{actor} resorts to a professional foul to stop the mounting pressure!

YELLOW_CARD.text: **Yellow Card!** {actor} goes into the book after a reckless challenge.
**Booking!** The referee pulls out a yellow card for {actor}.
A stern warning backed up — {actor} is cautioned for the foul.
**Late booking!** {actor} picks up a yellow card at a critical stage of the match.

INJURY.text: **Injury concern!** {actor} goes down clutching their leg and needs medical attention.
Stoppage in play as {actor} is helped off the pitch with an injury.
The physio rushes on — {actor} looks in real discomfort.
Worrying scenes late on — {actor} pulls up and can't continue.

HALF_TIME.text: The referee blows the whistle for half-time. The players head to the dressing rooms.
**Half-time!** The teams go into the break completely level.
**Half-time!** The home side holds a slim advantage at the break.
**Half-time!** The away team leads as the first half comes to a close.

FULL_TIME.text: The referee blows the final whistle. Full time!
**Full time!** A hard-fought draw between both sides.
**Full time!** The home side takes all three points today!
**Full time!** A superb away performance seals the victory!
